summary: Excellent soundboard capture with a tight, groovy short show.
review: The reviewer hails this as the best‑sounding source among the handful of available archives, noting fantastic clarity and groove throughout the performance. While the set is described as short, the overall vibe is positive and the recording quality is praised as outstanding.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review rates the show 4 stars and praises the soundboard quality as superb; weighting the strong recording (30%) with a good musical performance (70%) yields an overall rating around 4.3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the best‑sounding source on Archive, crisp and clear with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Short first set but maintains a solid groove throughout; overall enjoyable performance.
